user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Adatum Corporation. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-16 14:21 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Adatum Corporation forecast prep

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with forecast prep. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
Date: 2024-02-23 09:49 EST
Subject: Follow-up: forecast prep Review

There's been a change in our timeline for forecast prep. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-04 16:49 EST
Subject: Re: Re: forecast prep Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about forecast prep. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: forecast prep Discussion - Adatum Corporation
Date: 2024-02-22
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation), Raj Mehta (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is forecast prep.

[00:08:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): On the forecast prep front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around timeline constraints.

[00:12:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): The timeline for cost optimization is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:15:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on budget approval and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:17:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): On the forecast prep front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around resource allocation.

[00:19:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for stakeholder alignment is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:24:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about integration complexity. Can we address those?

[00:28:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): On the forecast prep front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around performance requirements.

[00:33:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:35:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is budget approval.
